requests.research_question: In adults with type 2 diabetes, does SGLT2 inhibitor use reduce all-cause hospitalization compared to DPP4 inhibitor over 12 months in US claims data?
requests.instructions: Generate a structured evidence synthesis. Flag data limitations including formulary differences and unmeasured confounders. All numbers must trace to the cohort query output.

requests.research_question: What is the real-world treatment persistence at 12 months among patients initiating biologic therapy for moderate-to-severe psoriasis in US electronic health records?
requests.instructions: Quantify persistence and discontinuation rates. Note channeling bias risk due to prescribing patterns. All statistics from validated compute output only.

requests.research_question: What is the economic burden of treatment-resistant depression in US Medicare beneficiaries over 24 months, comparing esketamine augmentation versus treatment-as-usual antidepressants?
requests.instructions: Quantify total direct healthcare costs. Include inpatient, outpatient, and pharmacy components. Use HEOR cost-effectiveness framing per ISPOR guidelines.
